name: [fornecer: nome da marca (brand_config.identity.BRAND_NAME)] -- Brand Book
description: Build a complete brand book from brand materials (name, essence, logo, colour palette, and any brand text / URL / PDF). Produces 8 structured sections: brand identity, colour palette, typography, brand persona, logo use guidelines, imagery style, messaging framework, and do/don't guardrails. Never-fabricate: sections with no input emit editable [fornecer: ...] placeholders.

_meta.note: A2A AgentCard scoped to ONE CEXAI capability. supportedInterfaces is empty until this agent is deployed behind a URL endpoint.
